quadrants.title: Platform and Infrastructure
quadrants.description: Covers technologies related to cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, GCP), container orchestration (Kubernetes), databases, storage, networking, and SaaS platforms used by platform engineering teams.

quadrants.title: IaC and Automation
quadrants.description: Covers technologies related to Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Bicep, Pulumi), CI/CD pipelines, GitOps, configuration management, orchestration, and automation tooling used in DevSecOps workflows.

quadrants.title: Languages and Frameworks
quadrants.description: Covers programming and scripting languages, frameworks, libraries, SDKs, and runtime dependencies relevant to platform engineering, automation scripts, and DevSecOps tooling.

quadrants.title: Security and Observability
quadrants.description: Covers technologies related to application and infrastructure security (SAST, DAST, secrets management, policy as code, identity and access), as well as monitoring, logging, tracing, and alerting.

rings.title: ADOPT
rings.description: We recommend this technology for new development. We have used it for longer period of time in many teams and it has proven to be stable and useful. If your need is not covered by any technology in this ring, please raise it to IT management.

rings.title: TRIAL
rings.description: We recognise an interest in this technology and evaluate it's stability and value on non-production development. It is expected to be under trial for a set period of time before being moved into a neighbouring ring.

rings.title: HOLD
rings.description: This Technology is currently used in our organisation but should not be used in any new development. Maintenance is expected on it.

rings.title: ASSESS
rings.description: This technology is being assessed. No new development or maintenance is expected.

labels.title: Kiban Tech & Tools Radar
labels.footer: The purpose of this tech radar is to communicate what technologies are in use related to the IT in Kiban to provide guidance to new and existing software developers, DevSecOps engineers, security champions, application engineers, platform engineers, architects and others working on creating and maintaining our IT applications and infrastructure.
labels.notUpdated: This item was not updated in last three versions of the Radar. Should it have appeared in one of the more recent editions, there is a good chance it remains pertinent. However, if the item dates back further, its relevance may have diminished and our current evaluation could vary. Regrettably, our capacity to consistently revisit items from past Radar editions is limited.
labels.pageAbout: How to use Kiban Tech & Tools Radar?
labels.metaDescription: Stay at the forefront of web dev software and trends with Kiban Tech & Tools Radar. Explore insights on IaC, automation, security, infrastructure, monitoring, and more.
